actions.note: A previously applied shield is still running — no need to shield (or buy) again
If 'Only Shield On Enemy Buster Day' is enabled, abort unless the tracked server day is 6
Try to apply a shield already in the warehouse; sets the 'shield_found' flag
No shield in the warehouse — buy one from the alliance store if enabled
Still no shield and the alliance store didn't buy one — buy with diamonds if enabled
A shield was purchased — go back to the warehouse and apply it
